on_entry: v.x_dist = math.abs(q.position(0) - v.x_pos); v.x_digit_0 = Math.mod(Math.floor((v.x_dist * 10) / math.pow(10, 1) * 100), 10);
v.x_dist = math.abs(q.position(0) - v.x_pos); v.x_digit_1 = Math.mod(Math.floor(v.x_dist / math.pow(10, 1) * 100), 10);
v.x_dist = math.abs(q.position(0) - v.x_pos); v.x_digit_2 = Math.mod(Math.floor(v.x_dist / math.pow(10, 2) * 100), 10);
v.x_dist = math.abs(q.position(0) - v.x_pos); v.x_digit_3 = Math.mod(Math.floor(v.x_dist / math.pow(10, 3) * 100), 10);
v.y_dist = math.abs(q.position(1) - v.y_pos); v.y_digit_0 = Math.mod(Math.floor((v.y_dist * 10) / math.pow(10, 1) * 100), 10);
v.y_dist = math.abs(q.position(1) - v.y_pos); v.y_digit_1 = Math.mod(Math.floor(v.y_dist / math.pow(10, 1) * 100), 10);
v.y_dist = math.abs(q.position(1) - v.y_pos); v.y_digit_2 = Math.mod(Math.floor(v.y_dist / math.pow(10, 2) * 100), 10);
v.y_dist = math.abs(q.position(1) - v.y_pos); v.y_digit_3 = Math.mod(Math.floor(v.y_dist / math.pow(10, 3) * 100), 10);
v.z_dist = math.abs(q.position(2) - v.z_pos); v.z_digit_0 = Math.mod(Math.floor((v.z_dist * 10) / math.pow(10, 1) * 100), 10);
v.z_dist = math.abs(q.position(2) - v.z_pos); v.z_digit_1 = Math.mod(Math.floor(v.z_dist / math.pow(10, 1) * 100), 10);
v.z_dist = math.abs(q.position(2) - v.z_pos); v.z_digit_2 = Math.mod(Math.floor(v.z_dist / math.pow(10, 2) * 100), 10);
v.z_dist = math.abs(q.position(2) - v.z_pos); v.z_digit_3 = Math.mod(Math.floor(v.z_dist / math.pow(10, 3) * 100), 10);
